content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the two pending amendments. Planned-elsewhere routing now uses IDs from both `Already Planned Elsewhere` and `Nearby work` for review-stage guidance, scope guidance, final-review reviewer prompts, and final-review `mapped_to_bead_id` allowlist validation. Nearby context construction now avoids depending solely on sparse `br list` fields by loading bounded `br show` detail fallbacks for direct relations, the parent epic/sibling candidates, and top related-work candidates, then using detail title/status/description when available. Added focused regression coverage for nearby ID routing, final-review allowlisting, review prompt guidance, and sparse-summary sibling/description fallback behavior.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected existing nearby-context builder, prompt contract extraction, review classification guidance, stage prompt construction, and final-review allowlist paths for the pending amendments.
1. [Completed] Extended planned-elsewhere routing extraction to include `Nearby work` bead IDs, including review-time short-form aliases where appropriate.
2. [Completed] Updated review-stage guidance, planning scope guidance, final-review reviewer prompt guidance, and final-review mapping validation to use the combined planned-elsewhere/nearby routing ID set.
3. [Completed] Added bounded nearby detail fallback loading and wired nearby entry construction to prefer detail title, status, and description over sparse summary data.
4. [Completed] Added regression tests for routing nearby IDs, final-review mapping allowlist behavior, review prompt guidance, direct detail fallback, sparse sibling inference from parent detail, and related-work detail fallback.
5. [Completed] Ran focused tests and the repository validation gates, including the authoritative Nix build.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub extract_planned_elsewhere_routing_bead_ids_includes_nearby_work --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub final_review_mapping_allowlist_accepts_nearby_work_ids --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_infers_siblings_from_parent_detail_when_summaries_are_sparse --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_stage_prompt_injects_review_guidance_with_nearby_work_ids --test unit` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub service_emits_invocation_completed_trace_with_token_fields --test unit -- --test-threads=1` passed after the first full-suite transient failure.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed on exact rerun.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- The first full `cargo test --locked --features test-stub` run hit a transient structured logging capture failure in an unrelated test; that test passed when rerun serially, and the exact full cargo test command passed on rerun.
